metadata.title: Indonesia Golf Courses Directory
notes: Coordinates are best-estimates from address geocoding; verify before production map use.
Some courses (Bintan Lagoon Sea View/Woodlands) closed since 2020 - flagged in notes.
Several outer-island entries lack lat/lng; use Google geocoding API to fill in.
Listed courses verified through official sites, IAGTO, GolfPass, GolfAsian, Golfsavers, golflux, top100golfcourses, indonesiagolfcourses.com (APLGI).

courses.address: Jl. Halim III, Halim Perdanakusuma, Jakarta Timur, DKI Jakarta 13610
courses.notes: PGA standard; hosts CIMB Niaga Indonesian Masters since 2011.

fees_2026_05.notes: Weekday rates IDR 1,150,000-1,530,000; weekend rates IDR 2,440,000-3,250,000. Range varies by tee time slot. Official 'Golf Rate 2026' page exists but rate image not extractable; figures aggregated from 2026 industry summary. Caddy, cart, tax breakdown not separately published.

evidence: Official site has dedicated 2026 rate page: https://www.royalejakarta.com/golf-rate-2026/
Active on multiple booking platforms (golfscape, golfsavers, trip.com) with 2026 listings

courses.address: Jl. Metro Pondok Indah No.16, Pd. Pinang, Kebayoran Lama, Jakarta Selatan 12310
courses.notes: One of Jakarta's most prestigious championship courses; 5 minutes from CBD.

fees_2026_05.notes: Rates valid until 31 Dec 2026 per official site. Weekday Mon-Thu guest 18H IDR 1,618,000 (sharing cart). Friday IDR 1,928,000. Saturday AM IDR 3,968,000; Sat PM IDR 3,688,000. Sun/Holiday AM IDR 3,688,000; PM IDR 3,418,000. Tariff includes Green Fee, Cart, Caddy Fee & Tax. Single cart supplement IDR 280,000 (18H). Member 18H IDR 440,000 (sharing) / IDR 710,000 (1 cart).

evidence: Active 2026 booking presence on Trip.com, GolfPass, Golftripz
Updated February 2026 listings on Wheree directory

courses.address: Jl. Asia Afrika Pintu IX, Senayan, Jakarta Pusat 10270
courses.notes: 5,600 yards from back tees in CBD; renovated 2012.

fees_2026_05.notes: Tue-Thu morning non-member IDR 955,000 (member 830,000). Friday morning non-member 1,050,000. Saturday non-member 2,250,000 (member 1,955,000). Sunday non-member 1,655,000. Monday flat IDR 595,000 (member 520,000). Afternoon discounted (Tue-Thu PM 710,000). Night Golf Tue-Thu 785,000. Senior/Ladies Tue-Wed 595,000. Junior weekday 495,000. 18-hole urban par 69 course. Caddy/cart breakdown not separately itemized.

evidence: Active Instagram @senayangolfclub with 422 posts, 26K followers and 2026 reels (e.g., reel DQ3DKD8kmP-)
Night Golf 17:00-23:00 actively promoted (Korea Herald / PRNewswire 2025 coverage)
Listed as operating daily 06:00-21:30 in February 2026 directories
Note: course was renovated/rebranded in 2012; no GBK redevelopment closure found

courses.address: Jl. Radar Selatan No.1, Halim Perdana Kusumah, Makasar, Jakarta Timur 13610
courses.notes: Owned by Indonesian Air Force; 6,048 m total.

fees_2026_05.notes: Padang Golf Halim (TNI AU). Mon-Thu non-member IDR 366,000; Friday IDR 377,000; Sat/Sun/Holiday IDR 696,000 (Sun PM 575,000). Caddie 18H IDR 25,000; Cart IDR 60,000/player; 9H twilight 60-110k. Special TNI/POLRI rates much lower (Rp50,000-200,000). All rates include 10% VAT. Active/retired TNI AU IDR 80,000 (caddy included). Rates appear to be 2024-2025 levels; 2026 may differ slightly.

evidence: Tripadvisor 2026 reviews; managed by TNI AU but open to public
Daily operations 05:00-18:00 (closed Mon morning for maintenance)

courses.address: Jl. Jati Indah Raya No.1, Pangkalan Jati, Cinere, Depok 16513
courses.notes: Front 9 in S. Jakarta, back 9 in Depok; 5,885 yards.

fees_2026_05.notes: Home Base Program: Weekday Mon-Fri IDR 275,000; Weekend IDR 455,000. Ladies Golfer Program flat IDR 230,000. Cart excluded unless stated. 18 holes par 72, 5,885 yards. Membership: Platinum 19M/100pt, Gold 10.25M/50pt, Silver 8.4M/50pt. Rates from 2025 - 2026 may differ.

evidence: Reported avg ~4,500 visitors/month; open to public

courses.address: Taman Niaga Soewarna, Blok G Lot 1, Bandara Soekarno-Hatta, Jakarta 19110
courses.notes: Inside Soekarno-Hatta Airport area; 6,301 m.

fees_2026_05.notes: Public Mon-Fri IDR 628,000-688,000 (guest 628k, public 688k). Saturday AM IDR 1.99M-2.28M; Sat PM IDR 1.18M. Sunday AM IDR 1.68M-1.99M; Sun PM IDR 1.18M. Sunset Golf Mon-Thu after 2PM IDR 498-538k. Includes green fee, caddie, insurance, 11% VAT. Cart separate IDR 555,000/unit. Members from IDR 180,000/round. Transit Package IDR 725,000 (9H + shower).

courses.address: Jl. Modern Golf Raya No.99, Klp. Indah, Kota Tangerang, Banten 15117
courses.notes: By 5x British Open champ Peter Thomson; 6,311 yards.

fees_2026_05.notes: Modern Golf & Country Club, Tangerang. Weekday rate ~IDR 870,000 including sharing cart, caddy, tax (per gogolf summary). Equipment rental IDR 350,000/18H. Official 'Rate Golf 2025' page rate image not extractable. Weekend rate not publicly published; recommend contacting reservation@modernland.co.id / 021-5529228.

evidence: Official site has Rate Golf 2025 page: https://www.moderngolf.co.id/event-detail/Rate-Golf-2025
Bookable on BaiGolf, QGolf, GolfPass for 2025-2026

courses.address: Bulevar Gading Golf, Jl. Gading Serpong, Tangerang 15826
courses.notes: Championship course in Gading Serpong by Australian Graham Marsh.

fees_2026_05.notes: 2026 official rates. Guest Tue-Fri IDR 850,000 (incl green fee, caddy, sharing cart). Sat/Sun/Holiday AM IDR 2,200,000; Sat PM 1,700,000; Sun/Holiday PM IDR 1,500,000. Senior/Ladies Mon-Thu IDR 680,000. Junior IDR 620,000. Mon PM 720,000. Walking Tour Mon&Wed PM IDR 550,000. Member daily IDR 280,000 + cart sharing 205,000. Indonesian citizens & KITAS only. No insurance line shown.

evidence: Listed as currently operating (12:00-18:00 hours noted)

courses.address: Jl. Moh. Kahfi I Km. 7, Ciganjur, Cipedak, Jagakarsa, Jakarta Selatan 12630
courses.designer: B. Hasan, B. Santoso & Associates with Thompson, Wolveridge & Perrett
courses.notes: 60-ha tropical landscape in S. Jakarta; 8 km from city center. ⭐ Project subject.

fees_2026_05.notes: Tue-Fri: Guest 440,000; Public 490,000. Saturday morning IDR 1,295,000; Sat PM (after 12PM) IDR 745,000. Sunday/Holiday AM IDR 1,095,000; PM IDR 745,000. Includes Green Fee, Service Fee, sharing cart and taxes. Ladies Tue-Fri IDR 295,000. Site rates.htm not reachable; rates from gogolf review.

evidence: Active Facebook page (Matoa Nasional Golf & Country Club)
Marriott International Jakarta Charity Golf Day 2025 hosted at venue

courses.name_en: Damai Indah Golf - Pantai Indah Kapuk (PIK) Course
courses.address: Jl. Marina Indah Raya, Kapuk Muara, Penjaringan, Jakarta Utara 14460
courses.notes: Hosted World Cup 1983 and Indonesia Open 2007/2010.

fees_2026_05.notes: Damai Indah PIK Course. Rates valid from 01 February 2026. Weekday: Without Member (with cart) IDR 1,515,000; with member IDR 1,368,000; without cart 1,358,000/1,215,000. Friday-Sunday IDR 1,265,000-3,895,000 varying by day/time. Ladies Wed (cart) IDR 925,000. Senior Wed (cart) IDR 985,000. Playing Fee: Member sharing-cart 410k; Guest 435k. Weekend rates incl green fee, playing fee, twin-share cart + insurance & VAT.

evidence: Official site live: https://pik.damaiindahgolf.com/ and https://www.damaiindahgolf.com/
Linktree (linktr.ee/damaiindahgolfofficial) active; bookable on golfscape and BaiGolf

courses.name_en: Damai Indah Golf - Bumi Serpong Damai (BSD) Course
courses.address: Jl. Scientia Boulevard, Curug Sangereng, Klp. Dua, Tangerang 15810
courses.notes: First Jack Nicklaus designed course in Indonesia. 6,545 m.

fees_2026_05.notes: Damai Indah BSD Course. Rates valid from 01 February 2026. Weekday: Without Member (with cart) IDR 1,358,000; with member IDR 1,168,000; no cart 1,208,000/1,015,000. Friday (with cart) without/with member IDR 1,408,000/1,215,000. Saturday IDR 3,078,000-3,545,000. Sunday AM 2,789,000-3,078,000; Sun PM 2,189,000-2,415,000. Ladies Thu (cart) IDR 823,000. Senior Tue/Thu (cart) IDR 875,000. Includes green fee, playing fee, twin-share cart, insurance, VAT.

evidence: Airial.travel 2026 attraction listing; bookable on golfscape

courses.address: Jl. Permata Sari Lippo Karawaci, Bencongan, Kelapa Dua, Tangerang 15810
courses.notes: Lippo Karawaci. 6,429 m. Conceptual sculpture design.

fees_2026_05.notes: Imperial Klub Golf, Lippo Karawaci. 18H Mon IDR 748,000; Tue-Thu IDR 988,000; Fri IDR 1,048,000. Sat AM/PM IDR 2,358,000/1,758,000; Sun AM/PM IDR 2,158,000/1,548,000. Sunset Mon-Thu after 2PM IDR 588,000; Sat-Sun after 4PM IDR 898,000. Ladies Tue/Thu IDR 570k. Seniors Wed/Thu 690k. Juniors Mon-Thu 386k. 9 Warriors weekday 5:30-8AM IDR 450k. All rates incl GF+caddy+cart+tax+insurance. Service fee IDR 188,000 separate. Buggy/person weekday 248k / weekend 268k.

evidence: Annual Playing Rights (APR) program currently offered
Listed across Hole19, GolfPass, Golftripz with current rate sheets

courses.address: Jl. Cimanggis Boulevard, Tapos, Depok 16953
courses.notes: Palmer + Nicklaus pedigree (within Cimanggis Golf Estate residential).

fees_2026_05.notes: Emeralda Golf Club, Cimanggis Depok (27 holes). Monday: guests of members 1,038,000; visitors 1,288,000. Tue-Fri: 1,288,000/1,488,000. Sat AM guests 3,588k/visitors 3,788k; Sat PM 2,688k/2,988k. Sun AM 2,988k/3,088k; Sun PM 2,208k/2,288k. Includes Green Fee 18H, Cart, Service Fee, Insurance, Taxes. Note: site shows '2025' rates - 2026 may differ.

courses.address: Jl. Pasir Angin, Gadog, Sukaraja, Bogor 16720
courses.notes: ~45 min from central Jakarta. Clubhouse by Kym Hughes.

fees_2026_05.notes: Gunung Geulis Country Club, Bogor. 2026 official rates. Weekday Mon-Fri Guest IDR 1,300,000 / Member IDR 1,150,000. Saturday Guest AM 3,100,000 / Member AM 2,400,000; Sat PM Guest 2,100,000 / Member 1,700,000. Sunday/Holiday Guest AM 2,200,000 / PM 1,600,000; Member AM 1,700,000 / PM 1,350,000. Extra Round IDR 525,000. Includes Green Fee, Caddie, Buggy Twin Share, Insurance (Personal Accident), Staff Appreciation, Hole-in-one Jackpot & VAT. Loving Monday promo IDR 383,000.

evidence: Bookable on golfscape and GoGolf with active reservation flow

courses.address: Jl. Sumur Batu Bukit Sentul, Babakan Madang, Sentul City, Bogor 16810
courses.notes: 6,538 yards. Signature Gary Player design.

fees_2026_05.notes: Sentul Highlands Golf Club, Bogor (Gary Player design). Weekday IDR 650-700k; Saturday IDR 2.1M; Sunday IDR 1.75M. Highest fees in the Sentul area. Official prices page returned 403; figures from 2025 TripAdvisor and gogolf reviews. 2026 rates likely similar or slightly higher. Caddy/cart not separately itemized.

evidence: Hosted PB PGI National Amateur Championship May 2025; planned return 2026 (GolfTimes article)

courses.address: Jl. Padang Golf Bukit Pelangi, Cijayanti, Babakan Madang, Bogor 16720
courses.designer: J. Michael Poellot; Robert Moore Jr. (Stone Hills)
courses.notes: JMP design with Stone Hills 9 by R. Moore Jr.

fees_2026_05.notes: Rainbow Hills Golf Club, Sentul/Bogor (27 holes Mountain & Forest). Weekday AM IDR 652,000 / PM IDR 525,000. Saturday AM 1,635,000 / PM 1,052,000. Sunday AM 1,415,000 / PM 975,000. Includes green fee, caddy, golf cart. Senior 55+ age-based discounts. Special prices not valid on holidays. 2025 rates from gogolf - 2026 may differ.

evidence: All three nines (Forest, Stone Hills, Mountain) listed as open to public on GolfPass
Cvent venue listing current; reservations: rsv@rainbowhillsgolf.com

courses.address: Golf Estate Bogor Raya, Sukaraja, Bogor 16710
courses.notes: 6,320 m. Top 4 locker room worldwide (Golf Vacation Magazine).

fees_2026_05.notes: Klub Golf Bogor Raya. Weekday non-member ~IDR 672,000 (older 2023 reference). Member from IDR 300k weekday. Weekend rates IDR 1,760,000 - 3,030,000 inclusive of buggy, caddie, green fee, tax. Driving range 100 balls IDR 75-95k. Specific 2026 rates not publicly published; recommend booking via official channels.

evidence: Official site live: https://www.klubgolfbogorraya.com/ (updated within last weeks)
Novotel Bogor Golf Resort partnership active; reservations +62 811-9718-844

courses.address: Jl. Permata Sentul Raya No.1504, Tangkil, Citeureup, Bogor 16810
courses.designer: Peter Thomson, Michael Wolveridge & Ross Perrett
courses.notes: Classic British parkland design; 5,829 m.

fees_2026_05.notes: Permata Sentul Golf Club, Bogor. Monday flat IDR 445,000. Tue-Fri AM with member IDR 648,000 / without 708,000; PM with 528,000 / without 588,000. Sat with member AM 1,748,000 / PM 968,000; without member AM 1,948,000 / PM 1,048,000. Sunday/Holiday with member 1,268,000; without member AM 1,408,000 / PM 928,000. Female & Junior weekday flat 498,000. Senior 55+ discount. Includes green fee, caddy fee, cart, insurance.

evidence: IKPI partnership announcement; current 2025-2026 published green fee structure

courses.address: Jl. Bukit Golf Riverside, Bojong Nangka, Gunung Putri, Bogor 16965
courses.notes: First Greg Norman course in Indonesia; 90 ha along Cikeas River.

fees_2026_05.notes: Riverside Golf Club, Cibubur (Greg Norman design). Tuesday 18 holes IDR 950,000; weekend PM (after 12PM) IDR 1,400,000. Senior all-you-can-play after 2PM IDR 850,000. Ladies Tue/Thu IDR 855,000 + free voucher. Ladies/Senior weekend IDR 1,400,000. Inclusive of green fee, caddy, cart. Rough weekday IDR 700,000 published; promotional 950k commonly listed.

evidence: Active Facebook page (Riverside Golf Club Cibubur); reservations: fo@riverside-golf.com

courses.address: Jalan Karanggan Raya, Gunung Putri, Cibinong, Bogor 16960
courses.notes: Indonesia's only 45-hole championship golf club.

fees_2026_05.notes: Jagorawi Golf & Country Club (45 holes). Weekday IDR 405,000-625,000. Saturday AM IDR 2,150,000 / PM IDR 1,195,000. Sunday AM IDR 1,495,000 / PM IDR 995,000. Shared cart pricing applies. Ramadan/seasonal promos common (e.g., GF+caddie 18H IDR 499,000 limited). Official site directs to Instagram for latest rates. Caddy/cart/tax breakdown not separately published.

evidence: Tripadvisor 2025 listing; 45-hole facility (Old, New, Z-Nine) active

courses.address: Jl. Rancamaya Utama, Ciawi, Bogor 16720
courses.notes: 6,931 yards championship course in Ciawi.

fees_2026_05.notes: Rancamaya Golf & Country Club, Bogor. Weekday AM IDR 1,200,000 / PM IDR 1,000,000. Saturday AM IDR 3,180,000 / PM IDR 1,850,000. Sunday/Holiday AM IDR 2,580,000 / PM IDR 1,850,000. Promo Senior/Ladies/Junior weekday IDR 880,000 (or 540,000 net per official). Includes Cart, Caddie, Green Fee & 11% VAT. Driving range 50 balls IDR 130k / 100 balls 200k.

evidence: Official site live: https://rancamayagolf.com/ with current Golf Rate page

courses.address: Jl. Raya Lemahabang, Cikarang Baru, Sertajaya, Cikarang Timur, Bekasi 17581
courses.notes: By 6x major champion Nick Faldo. 70 ha in Jababeka Industrial Estate.

fees_2026_05.notes: Jababeka Golf & Country Club, Cikarang. Mon Rp475,000; Tue-Fri Rp575,000; Sat-Sun Rp1,200,000-1,750,000. Weekend morning (05:25-08:00) Rp 2,025,000; afternoon (11:22-13:00) Rp 1,525,000 on holidays. Includes green fee, service fee, cart, insurance. Caddy bundled. Subject to change.

evidence: May 2025 reciprocal agreement signed with Tateshina Kogen CC (Japan); 2025 weekday/weekend rates published

courses.address: Jl. Bukit Indah Golf 1, Telukjambe Timur, Karawang 41361
courses.notes: Formerly Sedana / Karawang International Golf Club. 6,422 yards.

fees_2026_05.notes: Palm Springs Golf & Country Club Karawang Course (formerly Sedana). 18-hole international standard. Specific 2026 rates not publicly published online (site returned 503). Course described as having 'very friendly green fees'. Contact: +62 267 644730/42, WA 0822-1193-3648, Marketing.karawang@palmspringsgolf.co. Rate card not extractable from current sources.

courses.address: MNC Lido City SEZ, Jl. Raya Bogor-Sukabumi Km 21, Cigombong, Bogor 16110
courses.notes: Trump Golf's first Southern Hemisphere venture; opened late 2023.

fees_2026_05.notes: Trump International Golf Club Lido (Ernie Els design, near Bogor). Members-only with limited non-member access. Membership USD 70,000. Visitor green fees reportedly start ~USD 250-350 (~AUD 350) when individually approved. Only 80 players permitted daily. IDR-denominated rate card not publicly available; rates by individual quote.

evidence: Officially opened 2024 (delayed from earlier target); Facebook post 'Now open' confirms
AGIF March 2025 Milestone article + November 2025 honour: https://agif.asia/2025/11/honour-for-trump-international-golf-club-lido/
Named Best Golf Course Indonesia by World Golf Awards

courses.address: Jl. Dr. Sumeru No.96, Menteng, Bogor Barat, Bogor 16111
courses.notes: Heritage 9-hole; 3,288 yards.

fees_2026_05.notes: Bogor Golf Club (BGC), heritage course built 1935. 9-hole layout (some sources cite 18 with par 71 Graham Marsh redesign), 8 hectares. General Bogor green fees noted to start from ~IDR 200,000. Specific course rate card not publicly available online for 2025/2026.

evidence: Listed in current 2025/2026 Bogor golf directories (GolfLux, GoGolf)
9-hole heritage course (built 1935), also known as RSJMM Heritage Golf Field
No dedicated official site or recent social media verified within 6 months; no closure announcement found

courses.address: Jl. Saridewata No.1, Kotabaru Parahyangan, Padalarang, Bandung Barat 40553
courses.course_layout: Front 9 hills/ravines; Back 9 alongside Saguling Lake (7 bridges)
courses.notes: 7,298 yards. 2023 World Golf Award - Indonesia's Best.

fees_2026_05.notes: Weekday AM-PM Rp 1,018,000. Saturday AM Rp 2,408,000 / PM Rp 1,608,000. Sunday & Public Holiday AM Rp 2,148,000 / PM Rp 1,408,000. All-inclusive: Green Fee + shared Golf Cart + Caddie. Min 2 players weekday, 3 weekend.

evidence: https://www.parahyangangolf.com/ - official site with active green fees, promo, and tee booking pages
https://www.parahyangangolf.com/promo - active 'What's On' promotional events page
GoGolf and Asia Golf Trail offer 2026 tee-time bookings

courses.address: Jl. Dago Pakar Raya, Mekarsaluyu, Cimenyan, Bandung 40198
courses.notes: Dago Pakar area; mountain panoramas.

fees_2026_05.notes: Weekday IDR 750,000 / Weekend IDR 1,300,000 / Twilight IDR 675,000. Some recent visitor reports cite IDR 1,000,000-1,250,000 (likely with cart/caddy). Caddy and cart fees not separately published; bundle composition unclear. 18 holes, par 72 at 900m elevation in Dago Pakar.

evidence: https://resordagopakar.co.id/mountain-view-golf-club/ - listed on Resor Dago Pakar official site

courses.address: Jl. Ir. H. Juanda No.335, Dago, Coblong, Bandung 40135
courses.notes: One of Indonesia's oldest courses (1917); among hilliest.

fees_2026_05.notes: Official 2026 rates page lists prices via image: Tue-Fri morning from IDR 490,000, afternoon from IDR 430,000. Saturday morning from IDR 900,000 / afternoon IDR 800,000. Sunday morning from IDR 780,000 / afternoon IDR 700,000. Member rate IDR 250,000. Includes 18-hole green fee + shared cart + caddy. Closed Mondays.

evidence: Recent membership election event held February 15, 2026
No evidence found of any heritage preservation lawsuit closure

courses.address: Jl. Raya Jatinangor Km.20, Sumedang, Bandung 45363
courses.notes: Championship layout in highlands east of Bandung.

fees_2026_05.notes: No public 2026 IDR green fee rates published. Official rates page exists at jatinangorgolf.com/rates/golf but does not display numeric figures (image-only). Bookings via marketing@jatinangorgolf.com or +62 811 1111 6059.

evidence: DUPLICATE FLAG: This is the same physical course as bandung-giri-gahana (same Sumedang/Jatinangor address). The team's suspicion was correct.

courses.address: Jl. Raya Ciater Km.21, Cisaat, Ciater, Subang 41281
courses.notes: Highland resort at 800m elevation N of Bandung; golf details limited.

fees_2026_05.notes: Ciater Highland Resort is primarily a tea-plantation/glamping resort (entry IDR 15,000; golf-cart sightseeing IDR 25,000/person). No regulation 18-hole golf course operating; only a driving range. Public 2026 green fee data not available. Possibly not a competitive golf course.

evidence: Resort facilities listed include only a 'driving range' - NOT a full golf course
Multiple targeted searches for 'Ciater Highland' golf 9-hole/18-hole returned no full course
https://wisata.subang.go.id/view-ciater-highland-resort.jsp - official tourism listing mentions driving range only
CONCLUSION: Resort is operating, but a regulation 9- or 18-hole golf course at this property is not verifiable. Likely driving-range only.

courses.address: Jl. Golf Merapi, Kepuharjo, Cangkringan, Sleman, DI Yogyakarta 55583
courses.course_layout: Highland at ~800m elevation on Mt Merapi slopes
courses.notes: Mt Merapi backdrop; 30 min from central Yogyakarta.

fees_2026_05.notes: Mon-Thu IDR 539,000; Friday IDR 814,000; Saturday & Holiday IDR 979,000; Sunday IDR 896,500. All rates +10% tax. 20% off green fees for tee-off after 2pm on weekdays. Caddy/cart fees not separately listed in public sources.

evidence: https://www.instagram.com/merapigolf/ - active Instagram with 'GOLF RATE MERAPI GOLF 2026' post

courses.address: Jl. Palagan Tentara Pelajar, Sariharjo, Ngaglik, Sleman 55581
courses.notes: 22-ha course at Hyatt Regency Yogyakarta.

fees_2026_05.notes: 9-hole course at Hyatt Regency Yogyakarta. Range IDR 409,000 - 509,000 per person. Bookings made directly at Bogey's Terrace. Caddy/cart not separately disclosed.

evidence: Hotel under renovation Aug 21 2025 - Dec 31 2026, but golf course remains OPEN
9-hole par-30 course at Hyatt Regency Yogyakarta operates throughout renovation

courses.address: Jl. Raya Yogya-Solo Km.10.2, Maguwoharjo, Sendangtirto, Berbah, Sleman 55282
courses.notes: Adjacent to Adisutjipto Airport; Indonesian Air Force affiliated.

fees_2026_05.notes: Indonesian Air Force-affiliated course, open to public. Monday IDR 325,000; Tue-Fri IDR 370,000; Sat-Sun & Holidays IDR 690,000. Junior rates IDR 240,000 (weekday) / IDR 390,000 (weekend). Rates last updated August 2025; 2026 update not separately confirmed.

evidence: https://www.gelora.id/field/478?Date=20-Oct-2025 - active online booking platform with 2025-2026 dates
Confirmed open to public despite Indonesian Air Force affiliation

courses.address: Jl. Gatot Subroto No.1, Bulurejo, Mertoyudan, Magelang 56172
courses.notes: Near Borobudur Temple.

fees_2026_05.notes: Visitor weekday IDR 850,000 / weekend & holiday IDR 1,750,000. Member weekday IDR 255,000 / weekend IDR 355,000. Twin-share cart included; single cart upgrade IDR 150,000.

evidence: October 2024 Prabowo cabinet retreat used facility temporarily; caddies temporarily laid off due to remaining tents (merdeka.com news)
https://travel.kompas.com/read/2025/02/13/193042127 - February 2025 article about glamping facilities, normal operations confirmed
Bookings active via golfscape and direct phone +62 (0293) 313 758. No permanent closure.

courses.address: Jl. Gombel Lama No.90, Tinjomoyo, Banyumanik, Semarang 50262
courses.notes: Largest golf course in Central Java.

fees_2026_05.notes: Weekday 18 holes IDR 375,000; 9 holes IDR 212,000. Saturday 18 holes IDR 800,000; 9 holes IDR 475,000. Largest course in Central Java. Caddy/cart fees not publicly broken out.

evidence: https://visitjawatengah.jatengprov.go.id - listed as active Central Java tourist destination

courses.address: Jl. Candi Golf Boulevard No.1, Jangli, Tembalang, Semarang 50274
courses.notes: Semarang's only golf neighborhood.

fees_2026_05.notes: Graha Candi Golf Country Club. 9-hole course (par 36). Weekday 18-hole green fee from IDR 269,000. Club rental IDR 50,000; range balls from IDR 66,000/100. Weekend rate not publicly listed.

courses.address: Jl. CitraLand Utama, CitraLand Surabaya 60219
courses.notes: 125 ha. One of E. Java's largest venues.

fees_2026_05.notes: 27-hole course (Valley/Lake/Hill). Weekday IDR 235,000 - 1,453,000 (member to public top); Saturday IDR 260,000 - 2,328,000; Sunday & holiday IDR 260,000 - 1,918,000. Public visitor rates ~IDR 1.2-1.8M weekday, 1.8-2.5M weekend including caddy + cart + insurance.

courses.address: Jl. Bukit Darmo Golf No.74, Pradahkalikendal, Dukuhpakis, Surabaya
courses.notes: Jack Nicklaus II's first Asian design; 10 min from downtown.

fees_2026_05.notes: Weekday 18-hole: Member IDR 365,000 / Guest IDR 580,000 / Visitor IDR 910,000 (9-hole: 245k/410k/675k respectively). Cart IDR 200,000. Membership IDR 7.5M weekday-only, IDR 11.5M full-week annual. Weekend visitor rate not publicly disclosed (rates published may date back to 2020 baseline; verify with club).

courses.address: Jl. A.A. Maramis, Kairagi Dua, Mapanget, Manado 95252
courses.notes: 7 min from Sam Ratulangi airport. Formerly Wenang Golf Course.

fees_2026_05.notes: Public day rates effective Dec 1, 2024 (still current). With golf car twin-share: weekday IDR 590,000 / weekend & holiday IDR 815,000 (incl. green fee, caddy, buggy). Walking: weekday IDR 305,000 / weekend IDR 530,000 (incl. green fee, caddy). Accompany person twin-sharing cart: IDR 285,000. Cart rental: 1 pax IDR 285k / 2 pax IDR 570k. Insurance IDR 10,000. Driving range 50 balls IDR 40k / 100 balls IDR 60k.

fees_2026_05.notes: General visitor entry IDR 5,000/person but actual round green fee not published. Course functions partly as park. Contact: +62 812 3832 0997.

evidence: Functions primarily as public park with IDR 5,000 entry fee per multiple TikTok/Instagram posts 2023-2024
Driving range inaugurated by Governor Nov 15 2020: https://alkhairaat.com/gubernur-resmikan-driving-range-roviega-golf-palu/
Active Facebook 'Lapangan Golf Bumi Roviga Palu' (page 123828318310536)
No evidence of formal 9-hole tee times, tournaments, or active golfing membership in 2024-2026; appears to be picnic/leisure park rather than functioning golf course
operating_status.closure_reason: Course infrastructure appears partially repurposed as public recreation park; golf playability unconfirmed

fees_2026_05.notes: 9-hole course operated by Kodam XVII Cenderawasih. Green fee IDR 100,000 weekdays / IDR 150,000 weekends & holidays (weekend = weekday + IDR 50k). Caddy IDR 50,000 / 9 holes. Cart IDR 100,000 / 9 holes. Rates may be older but commonly cited.
